hero.subtitle: Tailored event staffing for weddings, private events, and businesses that expect more.

intro.label: About us
intro.heading: Professional event staffing – tailored to your occasion
intro.text1: A successful event is about more than décor and guest lists. It's about flow, atmosphere, and execution. It's about everything working — without you noticing.
intro.text2: BarPro delivers complete, professional event staffing for weddings, private celebrations, and corporate events. We adapt to your needs and develop solutions that suit the occasion, whether you want a classic and refined look or a more creative and energetic profile.
intro.text3: We provide experienced bartenders and service staff, and create drink menus tailored to your wishes. Signature drinks, themed menus, or timeless classics — we ensure the expression, quality, and details match the level of the rest of your event.
intro.text4: Our strength lies in the combination of structure and presence. We work precisely, efficiently, and discreetly, so you can focus on the guests and the experience.

services.label: Our services
services.heading: Everything you need for a perfect evening

bartenders.title: Bartenders & Service Staff
bartenders.description: Experienced and professional bartenders who create the perfect atmosphere. We adapt to your event and ensure every guest is well taken care of.

drinks.title: Drink Menus & Signature Drinks
drinks.description: Custom drink menus with signature cocktails designed especially for your event. From classic cocktails to creative innovations.

fullService.title: Full Event Staffing
fullService.description: Complete staffing solution for your event — from planning and preparation to execution and cleanup.

wedding.title: Weddings
wedding.description: Make the big day even more special with professional bar service and custom drink menus.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.description: Impress colleagues and clients with professional service that elevates your event to the next level.

private.title: Private Celebrations
private.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, and other celebrations deserve a bartender who takes care of everything.

process.label: The process
process.heading: Simple path to a perfect evening

tell.title: Tell us
tell.description: Share your wishes, ideas, and event details. We listen and understand your needs.

tailor.title: We tailor
tailor.description: We put together a customized package with staffing, drink menus, and everything you need.

deliver.title: We deliver
deliver.description: On the big day, we deliver a flawless experience — so you can enjoy the evening.

quote.text: When you choose BarPro, you choose more than staffing. You choose confidence, quality, and an execution that delivers.

ctaBanner.heading: Tell us what you envision
ctaBanner.text: Whether you're planning an intimate celebration or a larger event, we're ready to deliver a solution tailored to your needs. Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation — and we'll create the framework together.
ctaBanner.tagline: With BarPro, you get a partner who understands that the details make all the difference.

hero.label: Services
hero.heading: Professional services for unforgettable experiences
hero.text: We offer a wide range of services that ensure your event is exactly as you envision it.

bartenders.title: Bartenders & Service Staff
bartenders.text: Our bartenders are more than just drink mixers — they are experience creators. With experience from everything from intimate dinners to large festivals, we know what it takes to create the perfect atmosphere.

drinks.title: Drink Menus & Signature Drinks
drinks.text: Every occasion deserves its own signature drink. We design unique drink menus that perfectly match the theme and atmosphere you want to create.

fullService.title: Full Event Staffing
fullService.text: We take responsibility for the entire bar experience — from planning and purchasing to cleanup. You just need to enjoy the evening.

pricing.label: Investment
pricing.heading: Every event is unique — so are our prices
pricing.text: We provide a customized quote based on your specific needs and wishes. Factors that affect the price:

hero.label: Pricing
hero.heading: Clear pricing, no surprises
hero.text: We offer flexible packages tailored to different needs and budgets. All prices are indicative — contact us for a customized quote.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Ideal for weddings and mid-size events

eksklusiv.name: Exclusive
eksklusiv.description: Full-service for large events and corporate functions

services.label: Individual services
services.heading: Add-on services
services.text: Add individual services on top of packages, or build your own custom solution.

bartender.name: Extra bartender
bartender.description: Per additional bartender beyond the package

signatureDrink.name: Signature drink development
signatureDrink.description: Development and testing of one unique signature drink

extraHour.name: Extra hour
extraHour.description: Extend the event beyond the package duration

tasting.name: Tasting session
tasting.description: Pre-event tasting with up to 5 drinks

nonAlcoholic.name: Non-alcoholic menu
nonAlcoholic.description: Complete non-alcoholic drink menu as an add-on

travel.name: Travel outside Innlandet
travel.description: Travel costs for events outside the Innlandet region

cta.heading: Not sure what you need?
cta.text: Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation, and we'll help you find the perfect solution.

pricingPage.note: All prices exclude VAT and ingredients/beverages unless otherwise agreed.

story.text1: BarPro was founded by Emil and Sofie with a simple vision: to deliver premium bartender and event staffing that exceeds expectations. With backgrounds from some of Norway's best venues and events, we saw a need for professional bar service that could adapt to any occasion.
story.text2: Today, we are proud to offer tailored solutions for weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations in Innlandet and all of Norway. Every event we take on is treated with the same dedication and attention to detail.

emil.name: Emil
emil.bio: With years of experience as a bartender, Emil brings creativity and expertise to every event. His passion for the craft inspires the entire team.

sofie.name: Sofie
sofie.bio: Sofie is the brain behind the logistics. With an eye for detail and a genuine joy for creating great experiences, she ensures everything runs smoothly.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We always deliver the highest quality — from the ingredients we use to the service we provide.

customization.title: Customization
customization.description: No two events are alike. We tailor everything to your wishes and needs.

presence.title: Presence
presence.description: We are fully present at every event, with genuine care for our guests' experience.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Professional event staffing for unforgettable experiences
